title: Russia’s parliament to hold final readings on crypto bill Tuesday
summary: Russia’s State Duma is set to consider the crypto regulation bill in second and third readings, with rules for investors and cross-border payments included.

title: Grayscale plans regular cash payouts from ETH, SOL staking rewards
summary: Grayscale plans to establish regular cash distributions from staking rewards generated by its Ether and Solana exchange-traded products.
